title: 14D 13N Christmas Holidays in Lapland
details: Highlights: Sweden, Finland, and Norway. Explore Stockholm, Rovaniemi, Kiruna, Tromsø, and Oslo. Experience the Arctic Circle, Northern Lights, husky sledding, reindeer safaris, snowmobiling, and a magical stay at the Aurora Glass Cabins. A once-in-a-lifetime Christmas journey through the Arctic Wonderland.
flyer: assets/data/packages/europe/Chirstmas Holidays in LAPLAND/14D 13N Christmas Holidays in LAPLAND.pdf

itinerary.day_title: Day 1: Departure – Manila ✈ Stockholm, Sweden (Dinner on board)
itinerary.day_details: Check in at NAIA Terminal 3 for your Emirates flight to Stockholm via Dubai. Enjoy in-flight meals and entertainment. Flight Details: EK335 MNL–DXB 23:30–04:45 / EK157 DXB–ARN 08:20–12:40.

Welcome to Sweden! Meet and greet your Tour Director. Drive to the city center and visit the world-famous Vasa Museum. Enjoy free time for photo ops, coffee break, and souvenir shopping before hotel check-in, early dinner, and overnight.

Visit Storkyrkan, the Royal Palace, the Swedish Parliament, and City Hall. Experience Gamla Stan (Old Town) on a guided walking tour, explore Stortorget Square, and admire the colorful buildings. Dinner and overnight in Stockholm.

itinerary.day_title: Day 4: Skansen Immersion & Overnight Baltic Cruise (B/D)
itinerary.day_details: Experience traditional rural life at Skansen Open-Air Museum. In the afternoon, transfer to the port and embark on your overnight Baltic Cruise bound for Finland. Dinner and breakfast on board.

itinerary.day_title: Day 5: Disembark Cruise & Helsinki City Tour, Finland (B/D)
itinerary.day_details: Arrive in Helsinki. Visit Havis Amanda, Senate Square, Helsinki Cathedral, Uspenski Cathedral, and the Rock Church (Temppeliaukio). End the day strolling through Kauppatori Market for Finnish souvenirs and crafts. Dinner and overnight.

Fly to Rovaniemi, the capital of Finnish Lapland. Explore the charming town with children sledding in the streets, and enjoy shopping and dining. Transfer to hotel for check-in, dinner, and overnight.
Visit the hometown of Santa Claus at the Arctic Circle. Meet Santa himself, cross the Arctic Circle line, and enjoy souvenir shopping at Santa Claus Village. Return to hotel for dinner and overnight.

itinerary.day_title: Day 8: Head to Levi – Husky Farm – Aurora Glass Cabin Stay (B/D)
itinerary.day_details: Travel to Levi for a Husky Safari. Drive your own sled pulled by energetic huskies through the snowy landscapes. After lunch, check in at your Aurora Glass Cabin. Relax in a traditional Finnish sauna and gaze at the Northern Lights through your cabin’s glass roof.

itinerary.day_title: Day 9: Onwards to Kiruna – Arctic Snow Hotel & Rustic Kota Dinner (B/D)
itinerary.day_details: Head north to Kiruna and check in at the Arctic Snow Hotel. Experience dining in a rustic Kota with a 3-course dinner featuring local specialties. Enjoy the cozy Sámi-inspired atmosphere and overnight stay.

itinerary.day_title: Day 10: Kiruna – Narvik – Snowmobiling to Tromsø, Norway (B/D)
itinerary.day_details: Travel to the wilderness base camp. Ride a 2-person snowmobile through frozen lakes and snow-covered forests guided by a professional Arctic expert. Continue to Tromsø, Norway for dinner and overnight.

itinerary.day_title: Day 11: Discover the Arctic – Tromsø Reindeer Safari (B/D)
itinerary.day_details: Visit the Polar Museum, Skansen district, and Storgata pedestrian street. Meet the reindeer herders, enjoy a sleigh ride, and learn about Sámi culture. Stop by the Catholic and Protestant Cathedrals, Market Square, and Mack Brewery. Dinner and overnight in Tromsø.
Transfer to Tromsø Airport for your flight to Oslo. Upon arrival, check in at your hotel and enjoy dinner. Overnight in Oslo.

itinerary.day_title: Day 13: Oslo City Tour – End of Tour (B/D)
itinerary.day_details: Explore Vigeland Sculpture Park, Oslo Opera House, the Royal Palace, Parliament Building, City Hall, Akershus Fortress, and Aker Brygge Harbour. Enjoy free time before your farewell dinner and prepare for your flight home.
Depart Oslo via Emirates Airlines. Flight Details: EK160 OSL–DXB 14:00–23:55 / EK334 DXB–MNL 09:25–21:35. Arrival in Manila. Home sweet home!

inclusions: Roundtrip economy airfare via Emirates Airlines
30 kg check-in baggage + 7 kg hand-carry allowance
Regional/domestic flights ARN–RVN / TOS–OSL with taxes and 23 kg baggage
Inside cabin on overnight Baltic Cruise (with dinner & breakfast)
Hotel accommodation (twin sharing) in local 4★ category
Experience overnight stay in Aurora Glass Cabins with Northern Lights view
Activities guided by licensed English-speaking local experts
Meals as indicated (B – Breakfast / D – Dinner)
City, hotel, tourist taxes and local permits
Pre-departure orientation, travel kit, and souvenir
exclusions: Mandatory service fees for guide and driver – $120
Other expenses not mentioned in inclusions

Booking Conditions: All down payments are non-refundable. Full cancellation charges apply 30 days before departure. Rebooking allowed only due to force majeure or government restrictions.
